TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_u_cudad_nu_mapalaway_a_dabak(20181018)Ôľöu_kawaw_nu_Palamal, title = u_cudad_nu_mapalaway_a_dabak(20181018)Ôľöu_kawaw_nu_Palamal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/u_cudad_nu_mapalaway_a_dabak(20181018)Ôľöu_kawaw_nu_Palamal} }

S.FORM: u cudad nu mapalaway a dabak(2018.10.18):u kawaw nu Palamal lacul sakacacay a ngatu: 1. cima ku mikelid tu lisin nu Palamal ? 2. u canan ku kaukak, laylay atu zateng?ÁĶźśßč,Á®čŚļŹ,ťāŹŤľĮ 3. u canan ku adinguťĚą,tademawšļļ, liwliwŚ†ī,zazanťĀď,sakalukś≥ē? 4. cima ku mipuhpuhay nu mapalaway? di'tu asaca tademawa? 6. i panamuh tu di'tu a lawad sa, mipasei caykaw u mibahbah? 7. haymaw hanśļęśüĒ,teketekeda hanŚÄčŚą•,azihen tu mataśé•Áúľ,pitengilenŚāĺŤĀĹ,papuhpuhenśĖĹś≥ē,samisaydan saanśääŤá™Ś∑ĪÁē∂ťÜęÁĒü,amana pulung muculilšłćťúÄŤ¶ĀťõÜťęĒŤ°ĆŚčē 8. pawawada' a zateng ŚąÜÁĶĄś¶āŚŅĶ 9. putiput a zateng Śúėťöäś¶āŚŅĶ 10. pilucek tu pasayzaan 11. miasik tu liwliw, kya pasayzaan atu silsil
S.PHON: u ¶udad nu mapar~…ĺawaj a dabak(****.**.**):u kawaw nu par~…ĺamar~…ĺ r~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ saka ¶a ¶aj a Ňčatu: *. ¶ima ku mik…ôr~…ĺid tu r~…ĺisin nu par~…ĺamar~…ĺ ? *. u ¶anan ku kaukak, r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj atu zat…ôŇč?**,**,** *. u ¶anan ku adiŇču*,tad…ômaw*, r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw*,zazan*,sakar~…ĺuk*? *. ¶ima ku mipuńßpuńßaj nu mapar~…ĺawaj? di Ē~ °tu asa ¶a tad…ômawa? *. i panamuńß tu di Ē~ °tu a r~…ĺawad sa, mipas…ôi ¶ajkaw u mibańßbańß? *. ńßajmaw ńßan**,t…ôk…ôt…ôk…ôda ńßan**,azińß…ôn tu mata**,pit…ôŇčir~…ĺ…ôn**,papuńßpuńß…ôn**,samisajdan saan******,amana pur~…ĺuŇč mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ******* *. pawawada Ē~ ° a zat…ôŇč **** *. putiput a zat…ôŇč **** **. pir~…ĺu ¶…ôk tu pasajzaan **. miasik tu r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw, kja pasajzaan atu sir~…ĺsir~…ĺ
S.FORM: u cudad nu mapalaway a dabak(2018.10.18):u kawaw nu Palamal lacul sakacacay a ngatu: 1. cima ku mikelid tu lisin nu Palamal ? 2. u canan ku kaukak, laylay atu zateng?ÁĶźśßč,Á®čŚļŹ,ťāŹŤľĮ 3. u canan ku adinguťĚą,tademawšļļ, liwliwŚ†ī,zazanťĀď,sakalukś≥ē? 4. cima ku mipuhpuhay nu mapalaway? di'tu asaca tademawa? 6. i panamuh tu di'tu a lawad sa, mipasei caykaw u mibahbah? 7. haymaw hanśļęśüĒ,teketekeda hanŚÄčŚą•,azihen tu mataśé•Áúľ,pitengilenŚāĺŤĀĹ,papuhpuhenśĖĹś≥ē,samisaydan saanśääŤá™Ś∑ĪÁē∂ťÜęÁĒü,amana pulung muculilšłćťúÄŤ¶ĀťõÜťęĒŤ°ĆŚčē 8. pawawada' a zateng ŚąÜÁĶĄś¶āŚŅĶ 9. putiput a zateng Śúėťöäś¶āŚŅĶ 10. pilucek tu pasayzaan 11. miasik tu liwliw, kya pasayzaan atu silsil
